message:
fix: add dependency cycle detection for expansion formulas

Workflow formulas had cycle detection but expansion formulas did not,
despite also supporting dependency chains via the needs field. Extracted
the cycle detection into a shared checkDependencyCycles helper and
added checkExpansionCycles to validateExpansion.

Fixes gt-pow5o

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
